[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *vrothberg* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Flibpod). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/libpod/blob/v1.0/OWNERS)~~ [vrothberg] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment

> LGTM, but tests are failing.

The CI doesn't start in this branch at all, so I hope that's not my fight :^)
@vrothberg Should we just force merge then?

> @vrothberg Should we just force merge then?

@mheon WDYT?

@vrothberg From what I understood from Chris, this isn't likely to start working soon... Given that, if we can manually do basic compile and functionality checks on RHEL8 for this branch and the 1.4 one, I think we're good to merge.
